steps.title: Find the x-coordinate
steps.content: Use the linear equation first: $$x+5=14$$ $$x=9$$ So the intersection must have $x=9$.

steps.title: Find the y-coordinate
steps.content: Substitute $x=9$ into the other equation: $$y=3(9)^2+3=3(81)+3=246$$ The solution to the system is the point that satisfies both equations, so the graphs intersect at $(9,246)$. That is choice C.
